{{Quote|A molecular dentist on Argo-6, performing a routine molar cracking, uncovered a tiny but complex farm in the mouth of one of her patients.|''The Galactic Gossip''|<ref name="Monsters" />}}
'''Argo-6''' was a terrestrial astronomical object, the climate of which featured several seasons. All members of a [[Unidentified family (Argo-6)|family]] residing on the celestial body maintained miniature [[Farm/Legends|farms]] in their [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]], which helped provide them with [[Foodstuff/Legends|sustenance]]. The farm in the mouth of [[Unidentified patient (Argo-6)|one member]] of the family contained fields of [[alfalfa]], [[Endorian chicken|chicken]] coops, and a complex [[Water/Legends|irrigation]] system.<ref name="Monsters" />

At some point, that individual visited a [[Unidentified molecular dentist|molecular dentist]] on Argo-6. While performing a routine [[Tooth/Legends|molar]] cracking procedure, the [[Molecular dentist|dentist]] discovered the farm in her patient's mouth. Subsequently, comments of both the [[Doctor/Legends|dentist]] and the patient on the discovery were included in an article in the [[August 8 (in-universe)|August 8]], [[6094]] issue of [[Galactic Gossip|''The Galactic Gossip'']] publication.<ref name="Monsters" />

==Behind the scenes==
Argo-6 was mentioned in the [[1993]] book ''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]'', a publication that combines creature designs and photographs from various projects of [[George Lucas]], creator of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' franchise, with original text by [[Bob Carrau]].<ref name="Monsters" /> [[Lucasfilm]] employee [[Leland Chee]], who maintains the [[Holocron continuity database]], has indicated that information contained in ''Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas'' is [[Canon|non-canonical]]<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=690#14724917|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-05-03|time=5:45 PM|quote=And is information from Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas canon? Unless referred to by a source that is in-continuity, the information is non-continuity.}}</ref> with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="Legends">{{SW|url=news/the-legendary-star-wars-expanded-universe-turns-a-new-page|text=The Legendary Star Wars Expanded Universe Turns a New Page}}</ref> However, the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and its [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] built upon the mention of Argo-6 by introducing the [[Argo system/Legends|Argo system]], which was situated in the [[Tragan Cluster/Legends|Tragan Cluster]],<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> a part of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />
